parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.user_id AS user_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(u.full_name, ''), u.email) AS name,
  u.email AS email,
  string_agg(
    r.symbol || ' - ' || r.level || ' (Risk ' || r.risk_score || '/100, Guvenilirlik ' || COALESCE(r.credibility_score, 0) || '/100): ' || r.reason,
    E'\n'
    ORDER BY r.risk_score DESC
  ) AS rapor,
  count(*) AS adet
FROM users u
JOIN user_portfolios p ON p.user_id = u.user_id
JOIN risk_scores r ON r.symbol = p.symbol
WHERE r.created_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
  AND p.symbol <> 'GENEL'
  AND u.email IS NOT NULL
  AND u.email <> ''
GROUP BY u.user_id, name, u.email;

parameters.subject: =Gunluk Risk Raporu - {{ $now.format('dd.MM.yyyy') }}
parameters.text:
=Merhaba {{ $json.name }},

Takip ettigin firmalar icin son 24 saatteki risk ozeti ({{ $json.adet }} kayit):

{{ $json.rapor }}

-- BTK Agent (otomatik gunluk rapor)
